observations.summary: The subject is not just terrified but shattered, indicating a profound emotional breakdown.

evidence.quote: He was not merely terrified. He was shattered.

observations.notes: Strong emotional emphasis on the depth of fear and breakdown.

observations.summary: The subject's muscles are clenched rigidly, jaw locked, and breathing is a frantic high-pitched whistle, showing intense physical stress.

evidence.quote: The muscles clenched to rigid, jaw locked, breathing a frantic high-pitched whistle.

observations.notes: Physical symptoms underscore the emotional turmoil.

observations.summary: The subject has invested his will into shaping his father's dream and has spent all reserves defying an ancient force present since Hebron's early days.

evidence.quote: He had poured his will into shaping his father's dream and then spent every reserve defying something that had been old when Hebron was new.

observations.notes: Indicates a deep internal conflict and struggle against a longstanding, possibly ancestral or metaphysical force.
